brew log · first-time setup
This app uses Google Sheets as its database — free, in your own Google account.

1 — Open Google Sheets, create a blank spreadsheet named brewlog.

2 — Click Extensions → Apps Script. Delete existing code, paste toka-brewlog-backend.gs, save.

3 — Click Deploy → New deployment → Web app → Anyone → Deploy. Copy the URL.

4 — Paste it below. Share the same URL with your team.
apps script web app url
Please paste your Web App URL.
loading…
brew log
Track every batch from start to bottle
Pick a section to log or review your brews.
🪼
First fermentation
First fermentation — start date, vessel, sugar, tea, water & SCOBY.
🧾
Testing data
Log Brix %, pH & temperature readings per batch over time.
🍾
Bottling
Second fermentation — bottle ID, source brew, sugar, yeast, flavour & fridge dates.
📊
Analytics
Live fermentation, batch & bottling KPIs, and what makes a good brew.
